CustomField.formula: IF ( !ISBLANK(pd_jp_20151124__Contact__c ) , pd_jp_20151124__Contact__r.LastName & " " & pd_jp_20151124__Contact__r.FirstName , IF (!ISBLANK(pd_jp_20151124__Lead__c ), pd_jp_20151124__Lead__r.LastName & " " &pd_jp_20151124__Lead__r.FirstName, "不明") )
CustomField.label: Visitor名
